title: poa nemoralis var. scheuchzeri
intro: Poa nemoralis var. scheuchzeri, also known as Scheuchzer's grass or Alpine Meadow-grass, is a sub-species of the Poa nemoralis plant, a type of grass native to high-altitude mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. scheuchzeri include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support skin health and overall well-being.
